task_completion.description: Create the 'Bridged Traffic Signal' graph with the keepLastValue() function
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Bridged Traffic Signal' in the Graphite UI. The metric query or legend should show 'keepLastValue(servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1)'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Median-Smoothed Temperature' graph with the movingMedian() function
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Median-Smoothed Temperature'. The metric query or legend should show 'movingMedian(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature, 5)'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Continuous Disk IO' graph with the transformNull() function
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Continuous Disk IO'. The metric query or legend should show 'transformNull(servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes, 0)'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Clean Fleet CPU' graph with the aliasByNode() function
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Clean Fleet CPU'. The metric query or legend should show 'aliasByNode(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*, 1)'.
Look for the dashboard title 'Cleaned Telemetry' at the top of the Graphite web interface, indicating the dashboard has been successfully named and saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Graphite web UI being interacted with (e.g., adding panels, typing in metric queries), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The graphs display actual rendered data lines
integrity.visual_evidence: The graph panels in the UI should display visual data lines/charts, proving the metrics were actually queried and rendered, not just typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create the result JSON file to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen manually writing the dashboard JSON or the result file '/tmp/sensor_imputation_and_cleaning_result.json' in a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is 'Cleaned Telemetry'. The dashboard must contain exactly four graphs with the following exact titles: 'Bridged Traffic Signal', 'Median-Smoothed Temperature', 'Continuous Disk IO', and 'Clean Fleet CPU'.
